name: Mrs. Neeta Parmar
bio: Founded Kids Planet in 2010 with a vision to provide quality education in Kullu Valley. Leads the school with dedication and passion for nurturing young minds.

name: Mrs. Pragya Sharma
bio: One of the most experienced educators at Kids Planet with 15 years of dedicated teaching. Guides Class 5 students through advanced primary curriculum with a focus on conceptual clarity.

name: Mrs. Pragya
bio: Brings a decade of teaching experience to Class 4. Known for making complex subjects accessible and nurturing student confidence through interactive learning.

name: Mrs. Santosh Kumari
bio: A dedicated young educator who brings fresh energy to the primary section. Focuses on building strong reading and numeracy foundations for Class 2 students.

name: Mrs. Shivya
bio: Specializes in the critical transition year from kindergarten to formal schooling. Creates a warm and engaging classroom environment for Class 1 learners.

name: Mrs. Rashmi
bio: An enthusiastic educator who supports the Class 4 section with a focus on activity-based learning and student engagement.
